title: WhiteScreen
description:
🌐 WhiteScreen: The Ultimate Hardcore Loading System
WhiteScreen is a powerful server-side and client-side utility designed for hardcore communities and event organizers. It creates a synchronized waiting experience, ensuring all players are ready before t
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8Kvy1wlU6qk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>WhiteScreen: Professional Server-Sync Utility
WhiteScreen is a high-performance management tool designed for hardcore events and professional servers. It provides a globally synchronized loading overlay to ensure all players start their adventure simultaneously.

🔑 Key Features
Network Synchronization: Every player sees the same state, title, and progress bar in real-time.

Stealth Staff Mode: Hide administrators from the "Pending Players" list via a specialized whitelist.

Dynamic Presets: Instantly switch between professional themes (GTA, Left 4 Dead, Modern, Eufonia).

Admin Control: Full command suite for live customization of titles, tips, and player limits.

🚀 Technical Specs
Version: 1.20.1 (Forge)

Environment: Required on both Client & Server for data synchronization.

Persistence: All settings are saved in a JSON configuration file.
